title: Qualified opinion
subtitle: Avoid sounding absolute.
overview: Module: Nuanced Opinions. B2 Bridge moves from strong B1 output into abstract thinking, source reaction, nuanced opinions, natural style, and longer spoken independence.

sections.title: B2 bridge focus
rows: B2 Bridge starts when you can make a point without making it sound too simple or too extreme.
B2 Bridge 的开始，是你能表达观点，但不把它说得过于简单或绝对。
B2 bridge frame: state your view, qualify it, give evidence, and mention a limit.
B2 Bridge 框架：说出观点、做限定、给证据，并提到限制。
Give a qualified opinion about daily practice.
对每日练习给出一个有条件、有分寸的观点。

I generally agree that daily practice is effective, but it depends on the quality of the practice. Repeating sentences without attention may help a little, while deliberate shadowing can improve rhythm and confidence much faster.
我总体同意每日练习有效，但这取决于练习质量。不用心地重复句子可能有一点帮助，而有意识地跟读能更快提升节奏和自信。

items.en: B2 Bridge starts when you can make a point without making it sound too simple or too extreme.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 的开始，是你能表达观点，但不把它说得过于简单或绝对。

items.en: B2 bridge frame: state your view, qualify it, give evidence, and mention a limit.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 框架：说出观点、做限定、给证据，并提到限制。

items.en: I generally agree that daily practice is effective, but it depends on the quality of the practice. Repeating sentences without attention may help a little, while deliberate shadowing can improve rhythm and confidence much faster.
items.zh: 我总体同意每日练习有效，但这取决于练习质量。不用心地重复句子可能有一点帮助，而有意识地跟读能更快提升节奏和自信。

items.en: I will not rush to sound advanced; I will make the idea clear first.
items.zh: 我不会急着显得高级；我会先把意思说清楚。

items.en: Then I will add nuance: a condition, a limit, a contrast, or a counterpoint.
items.zh: 然后我会加入细腻度：条件、限制、对比或反方观点。

items.en: If the sentence feels too heavy, I can paraphrase it in simpler spoken English.
items.zh: 如果句子感觉太沉重，我可以用更简单的口语英语改说。

items.en: A B2 answer should sound organized, flexible, and alive.
items.zh: B2 回答应该听起来有组织、灵活、有生命力。

items.en: I will record one answer and improve the structure, not only the grammar.
items.zh: 我会录一个回答，并改进结构，而不只是语法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Give a qualified opinion about daily practice.
lines.zh: 对每日练习给出一个有条件、有分寸的观点。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I generally agree that daily practice is effective, but it depends on the quality of the practice. Repeating sentences without attention may help a little, while deliberate shadowing can improve rhythm and confidence much faster.
lines.zh: 我总体同意每日练习有效，但这取决于练习质量。不用心地重复句子可能有一点帮助，而有意识地跟读能更快提升节奏和自信。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add nuance or a limitation?
lines.zh: 你能加入细腻度或限制条件吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a condition, a contrast, or one fair counterpoint.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入一个条件、一个对比或一个公平的反方观点。

items.en: Give a qualified opinion about daily practice.
items.zh: 对每日练习给出一个有条件、有分寸的观点。

items.en: Answer once in four sentences, then expand it to six or seven sentences.
items.zh: 先用四句话回答一次，然后扩展到六七句话。

items.en: Add one phrase that shows nuance: generally, however, that said, or it depends.
items.zh: 加入一个显示细腻度的短语：generally、however、that said 或 it depends。

items.en: Record the answer and check whether the structure is easy to follow.
items.zh: 录下回答，并检查结构是否容易跟上。

items.en: Reuse the best sentence tomorrow in a new topic.
items.zh: 明天在一个新话题中再次使用最好的句子。
